c.d: Number of monthly active users; larger user bases offer a higher chance of connecting with more friends.
Variety of communication methods supported (text, voice, video, file sharing) impacts richness of interaction.
Granularity of privacy settings, including audience selection and data encryption, affects user comfort and safety.
Tools for managing and engaging with groups, such as shared calendars, polls, or dedicated chat channels, enhance collaborative planning.
Ease and quality of sharing photos, videos, and other media directly within the app affects the vibrancy of content exchange.
